analysis: The project appears to be a static website focused on black holes, with a dark, cosmic theme. The current files include HTML, CSS, and JavaScript for the main content, and there are additional files for a test website and a GitHub page. The theme should emphasize black holes with animations, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The CSS file needs to be completed with a full dark, cosmic theme, and the HTML should include interactive elements like animated slides and a mobile-friendly navigation menu.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a full dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Fix the syntax error in the listFiles function by correcting the string quotes for the downloadUrl path.
